clusters.title: This Place: Stories of Gurlbin-wula
clusters.neutral_headline: This Place: Stories of Gurlbin-wula

items.title: This Place: Stories of Gurlbin-wula
items.standfirst: This is Gurlbin-wula, part of Man-galagun — where the red dirt meets the turquoise waters on the edge of Broome. It's a place of spirit birds, storytelling, and deep connection to land. As part of NAIDOC Week the ABC is looking at Indigenous peoples' connection to country, and what makes it so special. NAIDOC Week is marking 50 years of Deadly and runs from July 5 until July 12.
items.content: This is Gurlbin-wula, part of Man-galagun — where the red dirt meets the turquoise waters on the edge of Broome. It's a place of spirit birds, storytelling, and deep connection to land. As part of NAIDOC Week the ABC is looking at Indigenous peoples' connection to country, and what makes it so special. NAIDOC Week is marking 50 years of Deadly and runs from July 5 until July 12.
